versions.installHtml:
helm upgrade --install pure-k8s-plugin oci://ghcr.io/k0rdent/catalog/charts/kgst \
  --set "chart=pure-k8s-plugin:2.7.1" \
  -n kcm-system
helm upgrade --install pure-csi oci://ghcr.io/k0rdent/catalog/charts/kgst \
  --set "chart=pure-csi:1.2.0" \
  -n kcm-system
versions.verifyHtml:
kubectl get servicetemplates -A
# NAMESPACE    NAME                            VALID
# kcm-system   pure-k8s-plugin-2-7-1           true
# kcm-system   pure-csi-1-2-0                  true
versions.deployHtml:
apiVersion: k0rdent.mirantis.com/v1beta1
kind: MultiClusterService
metadata:
  name: pure
spec:
  clusterSelector:
    matchLabels:
      group: demo
  serviceSpec:
    services:
    - template: pure-k8s-plugin-2-7-1
      name: pure-k8s-plugin
      namespace: pure
    - template: pure-csi-1-2-0
      name: pure-csi
      namespace: pure
      dependsOn:
      - name: pure-k8s-plugin
        namespace: pure
